tags.name: `mc-popover`
tags.description:
Purpose: Popover displays floating content next to a trigger element.
Category: Content Display, Forms
When to use: When you need to display additional information related to a specific element.
When not to use: When you have a small amount of information to display.
Works with components: mc-button, mc-tooltip
Alternative component names: Tooltip, Context Menu, Dropdown, Info Box

Events:

  * `show` {`CustomEvent`} - Dispatched when popover opens

  * `hide` {`CustomEvent`} - Dispatched when popover hides

  * `scroll` {`CustomEvent`} - Dispatched when popover container scrolls

Slots:

  * ` ` {} - The default slot where the content of the popover displays

  * ``trigger`` {} - slot where the element that will trigger popover goes. Not used when customtriggerelement property is set.

  * ``heading`` {} - sets the modal heading when the popover is set to be shown as a modal for specific screen sizes, using the "modalmode" prop.

  * ``footer`` {} - sets the modal footer when the popover is set to be shown as a modal for specific screen sizes, using the "modalmode" prop.

Attributes:

  * `dontflip` {`boolean`} - 

  * `dontshift` {`boolean`} - 

  * `arrow` {`boolean`} - Determines if the popover has an arrow.

  * `actionkeys` {`string[]`} - Keyboard key codes that will trigger opening/closing of the popover when the trigger element is focused.

  * `customtriggerelement` {`string | HTMLElement | null | undefined`} - HTML element to attach the popover to, or a string representing the element ID.
Can be used instead of `trigger` named slot.
When a string is provided, the element will be found using document.getElementById().

  * `fit` {`Fit`} - Fit of the popover.

  * `width` {`string`} - Specifies the width of the popover in CSS units i.e. `200px`. When set to `trigger` the width of the popover will be same as the trigger's.

  * `maxwidth` {`string | undefined`} - Specifies the maximum width of the popover in CSS units i.e. `200px`.

  * `maxheight` {`string | undefined`} - Specifies the maximum height of the popover in CSS units i.e. `200px`.

  * `modalmode` {`PopoverModalMode`} - Specifies when the popover should be shown as a modal instead.

  * `open` {`boolean`} - Whether the popover should be initialy open.

  * `position` {`Position`} - The placement of the popover. Note that popover will flip to the opposite position if it does not have enough space.

  * `trigger` {`string`} - Determines the events that cause the tippy to show. Multiple event names are separated by spaces i.e. `click focus`.

  * `preventcloseonblur` {`boolean`} - Prevent popover from closing when `blur` event is dispatched. Can be useful when trapping focus.

  * `dontadjustheight` {`boolean`} - By default popover will try to adjust its height and display a scrollbar to always stay in the viewport.
Setting this to true disables that behaviour.

  * `opendelay` {`number`} - Delay(in ms) after which the tooltip will open. Only supported when the trigger is set to `hover`.

  * `contextmenuonside` {`boolean`} - If true, the popover will be shown on the side of the trigger element when the trigger is `contextmenu`.

  * `zindex` {`number | undefined`} - Set only if two popovers or a poopver and another z-indexed panel need to overlap.

Properties:

  * `cleanup` - 

  * `contentElements` {`Element[] | undefined`} - 

  * `hoverTimeout` {`number | undefined`} - 

  * `latestClickTarget` {`EventTarget | null`} - 

  * `latestContextmenuEvent` {`MouseEvent | undefined`} - 

  * `triggerElement` {`HTMLElement | undefined`} - 

  * `latestOverflow` {`number`} - 

  * `latestMouseOverElement` {`EventTarget | null`} - 

  * `eventReferences` {`{ onFocusIn?: (() => void) | undefined; onBlur?: ((e: FocusEvent) => void) | undefined; onKeyDown?: ((e: KeyboardEvent) => void) | undefined; onMouseOver?: ((e: MouseEvent) => void) | undefined; ... 5 more ...; onDocumentScroll?: (() => void) | undefined; } | undefined`} - 

  * `footerSlot` {`HTMLSlotElement | undefined`} - 

  * `footerSlottedElements` {`Element[] | undefined`} - 

  * `dontflip` {`boolean`} - 

  * `dontshift` {`boolean`} - 

  * `arrowElement` {`HTMLElement | undefined`} - 

  * `detectOverflowMiddleware` {`{ name: string; options?: any; fn: (state: { x: number; y: number; initialPlacement: Placement; placement: Placement; strategy: Strategy; middlewareData: MiddlewareData; rects: ElementRects; platform: Platform; elements: Elements; }) => Promisable<...>; }`} - 

  * `arrow` {`boolean`} - Determines if the popover has an arrow.

  * `actionkeys` {`string[]`} - Keyboard key codes that will trigger opening/closing of the popover when the trigger element is focused.

  * `customtriggerelement` {`string | HTMLElement | null | undefined`} - HTML element to attach the popover to, or a string representing the element ID.
Can be used instead of `trigger` named slot.
When a string is provided, the element will be found using document.getElementById().

  * `fit` {`Fit`} - Fit of the popover.

  * `width` {`string`} - Specifies the width of the popover in CSS units i.e. `200px`. When set to `trigger` the width of the popover will be same as the trigger's.

  * `maxwidth` {`string | undefined`} - Specifies the maximum width of the popover in CSS units i.e. `200px`.

  * `maxheight` {`string | undefined`} - Specifies the maximum height of the popover in CSS units i.e. `200px`.

  * `modalmode` {`PopoverModalMode`} - Specifies when the popover should be shown as a modal instead.

  * `open` {`boolean`} - Whether the popover should be initialy open.

  * `position` {`Position`} - The placement of the popover. Note that popover will flip to the opposite position if it does not have enough space.

  * `trigger` {`string`} - Determines the events that cause the tippy to show. Multiple event names are separated by spaces i.e. `click focus`.

  * `preventcloseonblur` {`boolean`} - Prevent popover from closing when `blur` event is dispatched. Can be useful when trapping focus.

  * `contentWrapper` {`HTMLElement | undefined`} - Content wrapper selector

  * `container` {`HTMLElement | undefined`} - Container selector

  * `bodySlotWrapper` {`HTMLElement | undefined`} - Body slot container selector

  * `dontadjustheight` {`boolean`} - By default popover will try to adjust its height and display a scrollbar to always stay in the viewport.
Setting this to true disables that behaviour.

  * `opendelay` {`number`} - Delay(in ms) after which the tooltip will open. Only supported when the trigger is set to `hover`.

  * `contextmenuonside` {`boolean`} - If true, the popover will be shown on the side of the trigger element when the trigger is `contextmenu`.

  * `zindex` {`number | undefined`} - Set only if two popovers or a poopver and another z-indexed panel need to overlap.

  * `bodyOverflow` {`string | undefined`} - 

  * `bodyPostion` {`string | undefined`} - 

  * `windowScrollTop` {`number | undefined`} - 

  * `viewport` {`Viewport | undefined`} - 

  * `viewportResizeHandlerInFullScreenModal` - This is to revert modal body being pushed by the keyboard when
modal is displayed upon focusing on an input,
or close the modal when doing window resize while the modal is open.

  * `handleResize` -
